steps.t: Barad Rill is located at the southern tip of Dor-en-Ernil. Enter the stronghold at Barad Rill.
Dolgimil can be found somewhere in Barad Rill. Summon and confront Dolgimil.
Aras can be found at encampment in western Dor-en-Ernil. You should speak with Aras.
Herion can be found at his encampment in western Dor-en-Ernil. You should speak with Herion.
